title: Service down triage
excerpt: Check service health, dependency availability, and recent deploys before rollback.
steps: Confirm synthetic and user-facing availability failures agree before declaring outage.
Check 5xx rate, health-check failure reason, and dependency connection errors.
Compare incident start time with the most recent deploy and config changes.
Notify the owning team with the audit id, root-cause evidence, and suggested rollback reference.
validation_signals: logs contain connection refused or health-check failure
recent deploy occurred within the bounded incident window
safe_actions: Page the owner immediately for critical impact.
Follow health-check and dependency verification before remediation.
Consider rollback only through the approved runbook and with human approval.
avoid: Do not run shell commands from AI output.
Do not mutate Jira or Slack from the AI engine; publish the CDO handoff payload instead.

escalation.reason: Critical availability loss requires immediate owner confirmation.

title: Critical dependency outage isolation
excerpt: Use when service health checks fail because an upstream or downstream dependency refuses connections.
steps: Identify whether refused connections are local, network-policy, DNS, or dependency-side failures.
Check whether only one service is impacted or whether multiple services share the same dependency.
Validate whether traffic shifting or dependency failover is available in the approved ops playbook.
Record dependency scope in the CDO Jira/Slack handoff event.
validation_signals: connection refused logs from the affected service
health-check endpoint returns failure during the incident window
topology or trace evidence points at a shared dependency
safe_actions: Escalate to the service owner and dependency owner when scope is shared.
Keep rollback recommendation conditional until deploy correlation is confirmed.
avoid: Do not increase traffic or retries before dependency health is confirmed.

escalation.reason: Shared dependency failure can widen outage blast radius.
